title: Preview Pipeline
subtitle: derived preview preparation
description: Local storage preparation for derived asset previews. Currently renders GLB thumbnails through Blender and writes previews back under previews/<asset-id>/.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Preview Pipeline contract: local preparation, Blender thumbnail generation, no watch mode, and viewer boundary.

children.title: cache.mjs
children.description: Source-aware preview cache refresh used by Asset Viewer. Copies or renders only missing/stale previews and refreshes the selected source index.

children.title: render_library_previews.mjs
children.description: Selects shared-library model assets and runs Blender thumbnail rendering in resumable chunks.

children.title: render_thumbs.py
children.description: Blender script that renders one isometric thumbnail per GLB using the shared studio HDR.

children.title: make_studio_hdr.py
children.description: Rebuilds the shared studio HDR used by Blender thumbnails and browser model-viewer lighting.

children.title: studio_env.hdr
children.description: Shared studio environment used by generated model thumbnails and live 3D model previews.

children.title: studio_env.asset.json
children.description: Records integrity, provenance, and project-owned license evidence for the shared studio environment.
